label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 3

extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco won from a reduced GC group after VINGEGAARD was the only rider able to follow his late attack on the final climb.
tactical_patterns: BARDET Roman's long-range attack over penultimate climb failed; 10km descent plus 9km climb proved too far to hold solo.
Soudal-QuickStep paced aggressively on final climb despite no teammate ahead, suggesting confidence in EVENEPOEL's finish over rivals.
SEPULVEDA Eduardo punctured on descent while leading trio, revealing mechanical vulnerability on technical descents after hard climbs.
AYUZO Juan and SOLER Marc softening attacks isolated THOMAS Geraint before decisive move, exposing Sky/INEOS depth weakness.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: only rider able to follow and counter attacks on final climb, demonstrating superior form to fellow GC contenders
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: strong enough to match EVENEPOEL but unable to drop him, suggesting parity not dominance
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: dropped on final climb by AYUZO/SOLER harassment tactics before decisive moves, lacks climbing form
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: finished in main GC group after KUSS domestique work but didn't contest finale
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: 19km solo effort from penultimate climb summit caught before finale, tactical misjudgment of gap sustainability
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: paced aggressively for ROGLIC allowing him to conserve energy while rivals attacked
rider_signals.KEMNA Lennard: negative: caught from breakaway despite being last survivor, couldn't negotiate pace-sharing with CARUSO effectively
